data.body:
Goal:
Layer static analysis on top of `go vet`. `staticcheck` catches Go-idiomatic
bugs; `gosec` catches security smells (path traversal, weak RNG, unsafe
shell, hardcoded creds).

Verification:
1. CI runs `staticcheck ./...` and `gosec ./...` and fails on any finding.
2. Initial pass may need an allowlist (e.g. `gosec` may flag the `exec.Command` for `age` shelling — document and exclude with a comment justifying).
3. Each suppression has a comment naming the reason and a knot ID if a fix is planned.

Constraints:
- Knot ref: K-15; wave/step 3.3; effort S; risk low
- Files: .github/workflows/ci.yml, .staticcheck.conf, .gosec.yaml (optional)
- Depends on: K-13
- Notes: Resist the urge to broadly suppress; prefer fixing the underlying smell.
data.title: PR CI: staticcheck + gosec
